overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy traversing a lush, misty forest with red biomass and mechanical ruins. The character walks from a marshy area through dense trees toward a large corrupted mechanical structure, passing other NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty marsh with red biomass and spiky rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the marshy terrain with bow ready, navigating around spiky rock outcrops

notable_agents.action: companion warrior walking parallel path through the mist

entered.detail: jagged black rock outcrops emerging from the red marsh
carpet of red vegetation covering the marshy ground
massive gnarled tree trunk with exposed roots
decayed tree trunk lying across the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a misty marsh environment with distinctive red biomass covering the ground. Aloy walks forward past jagged black rock formations while a companion warrior is visible in the distance to the right. The atmosphere is hazy with diffused morning light filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense ancient forest with massive trees and hanging vines

events.description: sunlight breaks through the forest canopy creating a bright lens flare ahead
character passes by an NPC companion walking on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating the forest path, passing between large trees and other travelers

notable_agents.action: fellow warrior walking in the same direction through the trees
figure standing near a tree observing the surroundings

entered.detail: long moss-covered vines draping from tree branches
boulders covered in green moss lining the path
clusters of green ferns growing on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a denser forest area with massive ancient trees and hanging vines. The lighting shifts as sunlight breaks through the canopy around 25 seconds. Aloy passes other NPC warriors walking through the forest, transitioning from the red marsh to a more traditional woodland environment with mossy rocks and ferns.

scene_state.functional_zone: open clearing with massive corrupted mechanical structure

events.description: exiting dense forest into open clearing revealing large mechanical ruin ahead
direct sunlight creates intense lens flare as character faces toward the bright sun

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive mechanical structure with caution, scanning the area

entered.detail: massive towering mechanical structure with angular metal plates and glowing red corruption
pulsing red energy veins running through the mechanical structure and ground
tall giraffe-like machine visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest into a wide open clearing where a massive corrupted mechanical structure dominates the landscape. The lighting becomes intensely bright with direct sunlight creating lens flares. The environment shifts from dense woodland to an open grassy field with the mechanical ruin as the focal point, covered in glowing red corruption.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, corrupted marsh that gradually opens into a sun-drenched clearing dominated by a mechanical ruin. It begins in a hazy marshland where red biomass coats the ground and jagged black rocks line the path as Aloy walks past a distant companion. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a dense forest of massive ancient trees and hanging vines, with the diffused morning light transitioning into bright shafts of sunlight breaking through the canopy. The scene then expands as Aloy passes fellow warriors and leaves the mossy woodland behind, emerging into a wide open grassy field. Finally, the lighting becomes intensely bright with direct lens flares as the camera focuses on a massive, corrupted mechanical structure glowing with red energy.
